choices.text: many have grown used to the idea of having
numerous requests have been made to change
there has been a growing criticism towards
The milestone document sought to facilitate a new world order following
The previous international agreement on human rights had failed to prevent
The Great Depression of the new-war era had directly contributed to
Since then, many countries have abided by the declaration
More recently, however, states have started to think again
The current trend can be illustrated with two examples
Lessons from the past for future rights
Re-evaluating present rights for the future
Threats to human rights in the future
how we relate to our bodies.
the ways we can make money.
be extended to include machines, not only human beings?
be redefined in collaboration with big companies such as Facebook?
protect us from the artificial intelligence we ourselves created?

content.text:

options.text: It was a sheer stroke of luck

questions.main_text: What does Gary Robbins mention as one of the reasons for him to participate in the race? 3 p.

content.text: What does Gary Robbins mention as one of the reasons for him to participate in the race? 3 p.

options.text: Having good odds of winning this year’s race
Having a chance to meet the organizer of the event
Having an array of well-versed competitors

questions.main_text: “I couldn’t **marshall** the arguments fast enough, but I knew that it wasn’t interference,” said Bell Burnell. 2 p.

content.text: “I couldn’t **marshall** the arguments fast enough, but I knew that it wasn’t interference,” said Bell Burnell. 2 p.

questions.main_text: Having also ruled out broadcasts from “little green men”, Bell Burnell gathered more observations until eventually she found three more repeating pulses of radio waves **emanating** from different spots in the galaxy. 2 p.

content.text: Having also ruled out broadcasts from “little green men”, Bell Burnell gathered more observations until eventually she found three more repeating pulses of radio waves **emanating** from different spots in the galaxy. 2 p.

options.text: Relaxation is a necessity in our lives

questions.main_text: What irritates Florence about the park? 3 p.

options.text: It takes too much time to walk through
The uneven surface of the paths

options.text: They respected them but didn’t understand them
